steps.title: Test the listed point
steps.content:
Substitute $(7,0)$ into both inequalities. For the first inequality,
$$0\le 7+15$$
$$0\le 22$$
This is true.

steps.title: Check the second inequality
steps.content:
For the second inequality, use the same point.
$$0\ge -4(7)-15$$
$$0\ge -43$$
This is also true, so the point satisfies the system. The answer is D.
